data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for category tagging.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the category tagging functionality (cosmetic, functional, safety), but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm this capability. The linked use case mentions the need for category tagging but lacks concrete evidence of its implementation or validation. Therefore, the requirement cannot be conclusively assessed based on the current evidence.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or entities for category tagging.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the category tagging requirement.
